ddls:
CREATE TABLE "signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal */,
  "signal_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signal's function */,
  "direction" INTEGER /* Direction of the signal (Input, Output, Input/Output) */,
  "type" INTEGER /* Type of the signal (e.g., GPIO, PWM) */,
  "connect_component_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the component the signal is connected to */,
  "voltage_level" TEXT /* Voltage level of the signal */,
  "default_state" TEXT /* Default state of the signal */,
  "active_high_low" TEXT /* Active high or active low */,
  "pin_number" INTEGER /* Physical pin number on the component */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the signal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_direction FOREIGN KEY ("direction") REFERENCES signal_directions ("direction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES signal_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signals_connect_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("connect_component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the component */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_directions" (
  "direction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each direction */,
  "direction_name" TEXT /* Name of the direction (Input, Output, Input/Output) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("direction_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signal type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the signal type (e.g., GPIO, PWM) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal that was changed */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change occurred */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* User who made the change */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_history_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_history_changed_by FOREIGN KEY ("changed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_mappings" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mapping */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component */,
  "connection_type" TEXT /* Type of connection (e.g., direct, via interface) */,
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* ID of the interface through which the signal is connected */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the mapping */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_mappings_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_mappings_interface_id FOREIGN KEY ("interface_id") REFERENCES signal_interfaces ("interface_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_signal_mappings_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., hardware engineer, software developer) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signal being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the signal */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the signal was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_signal_id FOREIGN KEY ("signal_id") REFERENCES signals ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signal_interfaces" (
  "interface_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interface */,
  "interface_name" TEXT /* Name of the interface */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the interface's function */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the interface */,
  "model_number" TEXT /* Model number of the interface */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the interface */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or remarks about the interface */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interface_id")
)
